chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Abdul Qadeer Khan & another Present: Mr. fustice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro' Mr. fustice Muhammad;Qsman Ali Hadi' /t C.P.No.D-481 of 2025 / Petitioners Vs. Province of Sindh & others Respondents. 15.04.2025 Mr. Muneer A. Malik, Advocates for petitioners Mr. Khurram GaYas, advocate for KMC' Khawaja Shams ul Islam, advocate for resPondent No'5 Mr. Imran Ahmed Abro AAG. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Petitioners are aggrieved by rlvo lettersdaterloS.ol.2024cancelling/withdrawing1etterNo.07.2402-2022/so.||/ 1.600/22 dated 25.11.2022, and dated 1701 2025 cancelling lease/mutation of municipal Portion measuring 294 0 Sq' yds' on Plot No'20' Sheet No'NP-6' situated at Napier Quarters, Karachi. 2. Their main grievance is that while cancelling the lease etc' even a notice was not issued to them, nor they were heard in Person by the authority concernecl. Learned counsel for petitioners submits that if the Petitioners are afforded an opportunity of hearing by the relevant authority and only then an order is passed, he would be satisfied and would seek disposal of this petition' 3. To such proposal, learnecl counsel for respondent/ KMC' and learned AAG undertake that an oPPortunity of hearing would be afforded to the petitioners and only thereafter the issue as highlighted in the impugned ietters would be decided. Let this exercise be completed within 15 days from today through a speaking order, a rePort of which shall be filed in court for a perusal in chambers through MITJI' The petition stands disPosed of in the above terms alongwith pending application. r J \ Order with si ture of the Jud Date ORDER SHEET -( A.K &- JUDGE
